div.head: The Mexican Minister for Foreign Affairs (Torreblanca) to the American Chargé in Mexico (Norweb)Copy transmitted to the Department by The Chargé in Mexico in his despatch No. 1434, May 18; received May 22.
div.p:
Mr. Chargé d’affaires: I refer to that Embassy’s courteous note number 472 of March 29th last, in order to advise you that the competent
authorities have informed this Ministry that they would view with great satisfaction the conclusion of the agreement proposed by the American Government,An agreement by an exchange of notes was suggested similar to the negotiations between the United States and Canada in 1928 and 1929 ( Foreign Relations, 1929, vol. ii, pp. 114 ff). relative to radio communication, on behalf of third parties, between amateur stations of Mexico and the United States; but that, it being impossible to do this under the terms of the laws in effect, the authorities in question are considering the manner of broadening the restrictions governing the matter with a view to rendering possible the acceptance of the proposal of that Embassy.
